users..read: auth != null && (root.child('users/' + auth.uid + '/role').val() === 'super_admin' || root.child('users/' + auth.uid + '/role').val() === 'company_admin' || root.child('users/' + auth.uid + '/role').val() === 'factory_admin')

$uid..write: auth != null && (auth.uid === $uid || root.child('users/' + auth.uid + '/role').val() === 'super_admin' || root.child('users/' + auth.uid + '/role').val() === 'company_admin' || root.child('users/' + auth.uid + '/role').val() === 'factory_admin')

factories..read: auth != null && (root.child('users/' + auth.uid + '/role').val() === 'super_admin' || root.child('users/' + auth.uid + '/role').val() === 'company_admin' || root.child('users/' + auth.uid + '/role').val() === 'factory_admin')

$factoryId..write: auth != null && (root.child('users/' + auth.uid + '/role').val() === 'super_admin' || (root.child('users/' + auth.uid + '/role').val() === 'company_admin' && root.child('users/' + auth.uid + '/companyId').val() === newData.child('companyId').val()) || (root.child('users/' + auth.uid + '/role').val() === 'factory_admin' && root.child('users/' + auth.uid + '/factoryId').val() === $factoryId))
